query: SELECT id, name, SUBSTRING(especialidade, 1, 80) as especialidade, SUBSTRING(miniCurriculo, 1, 100) as miniCurriculo FROM consultors WHERE role = 'mentor' AND isActive = 1 ORDER BY name;
